feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Facing issue of email alerts are not able to send.
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
Please note that, the customer is not on active support from SAP hence we are not able to upgrade the database.
 
We are facing issue of email alerts are not able to send. 
 
We have done the following.
 
- SLD alert setting is enabled
- All SAP services are running
- Restarted Job services & Service layer
- Alert Query is showing result
-Alert user id unlocked & have super user rights.
 
Regards
Abdul.

entry.title: Support on a query
entry.content:
Greetings of the day.

Following is the query.

SELECT T0.[DocNum], T0.DocDate,T1.[ShipDate], T0.CardName, T1.[ItemCode], T1.[Dscription], T1.[Quantity], T2.[Code], (T2.[Quantity]*T1.[OpenQty]) 'Requirement',(Select T3.OnHand from OITW T3 where T3.ItemCode=T2.Code and T3.whscode='WH-WIP') 'In Stock',
(Select T3.IsCommited from OITM T3 where T3.ItemCode=T2.Code) 'Committed',
(Select T3.OnOrder from OITM T3 where T3.ItemCode=T2.Code)'PO',' ' as DataFROM ORDR T0 INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry] inner join ITT1 T2 on T2.Father =T1.ItemCode WHERE T1.[OpenQty] >0 and T0.[DocDate] >=[%0] and T0.[DocDate] <=[%1]

Need to pickup the value from the Default warehouse of the Item Code as it is picking up the total from all warehouse.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Updating ElecCommMessage on a Delivery Note using DI-API
entry.content:
Greetings,

I'm developing a software that will communicate certain documents to the Portuguese tax authority, and i need to update the electronic document status and message with the return.

However i noticed that the ElecCommMessage field in the DI-API is read-only.

I have also tried updating EDocErrorCode and ElecCommMessage, but i get the following error message:

[ODLN.EDocErrCod][line: 1] , 'Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029)'

I have also tried updating the same field using the service layer without success.

Has anyone updated these fields using DI-API or service layer? How can i do it?

entry.title: Try to update ShippingMethod via DI-Api to -1 in order line
entry.content:
Version: SAP Business One 10.0 SP 2411 for HANA

I am trying to set the ShippingMethod in order lines to the default value -1 with an update via DI-API. Unfortunately without success so far. The value -1 is not recognized. Instead, the value 15 is entered, which is contained in the OSHP table.

The update process does not produce an error. Since I also adjust the delivery date in the same step, which works, the question has arisen for me whether the value -1 cannot be set or whether it is a problem in the DI-API.

The same behavior exists via the service layer. However, I can update a NULL via the service layer, which is not possible via the DI-API.

Who has ideas or solutions?

Code:
I run a query to determine all order lines that should be updated
--------------
while (!oRecordset.EoF)
{
SAPbobsCOM.Documents oOrders = (SAPbobsCOM.Documents)oCompany.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oOrders);
int documentEntry = (int)oRecordset.Fields.Item("DocEntry").Value;
int documentLine = (int)oRecordset.Fields.Item("VisOrder").Value;

oOrders.Lines.SetCurrentLine(documentLine);
oOrders.Lines.ShipDate = DateTime.Now.AddDays(addDaysToCurrentDateForNewShipDate).Date;
oOrders.Lines.ShippingMethod = -1;

oOrders.Update()
}
--------------

entry.title: SAP Business One Mobile Service Traffic Abnormality
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We use the version of BOne for Windows
SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.240) SP 2402 (Security) HOTFIX1 (64-bit)

System Layout Description
1. We set up Nginx-Server on Azure VM and used VPN to connect to AP server and DB Server in the office to exchange data.
2. Users use BOne APP through the Internet.
3. For security reasons, we set up the B1IF service on Azure-Nginx.
4. Nginx will connect to the SAP DB Server through VPN and the office internal network to exchange data.

Question:
During the two years we used the SAP BOne APP mobile service, the average daily traffic generated was less than 100KBs.
Starting from 2025/02/13, the Internet traffic was abnormally high, reaching 20MBs per day, which lasted for 2 weeks.
We know from the firewall log that Azure-Nginx has been exchanging data with the DB SERVER during this period, but I don’t know what exactly B1IF is doing with SAP DB?
I want to try to start from the SQL DB perspective and find out if there is a log that records the exchanges during this period, so as to parse out what actions are continuously generating traffic, but I don't know which database table or related technical documents or support services to look for?

This incident directly caused extremely high costs and losses to the company, so we are eager to know the cause and establish countermeasures.

We need help or advice to prevent further harm in the future.

entry.title: The attachments in the business partner master data in sap will be lost after being uploaded
entry.content: After I uploaded an attachment in the business partner master data, the record of the attachment would disappear after some time. However, when I queried the database, I found that this atcentry had a record, but I couldn't find this record in the atc1 table. I can find these files in the attachment folder of the server. Why is that? The version of sap I'm using is sap b1 10.00.250

entry.title: My new UDO does not appear in UDO's list in a UDF with Link to UDO Validation
entry.content:
Hi,

I've already created and used several UDO's and all work fine.

Now, I created a new UDO and it doesn't appear to choose from the Link to UDO list in UDF Validation.

My steps where:

1. Create UDT of type Document

2. Create UDF's for the UDT

3. Create UDO from UDT

Now it appears in the UDO's list in the Object Registration Wizard

4. Create a UDF in the Production Order - Head

4.a. Choose Link to Entity in the Validation,

4.b. Choose Link to UDO

All the other UDO's I created before appear on the list of UDO's, but not the one I created now.

 

I already reviewed the Object Registration, and everything is Ok. I don't know if it makes any difference, but I choose not to create a Form, cause I'll use my own.

I don't know what to do, can anyone help?

 

Regards,

Arão

SAP Business One

SAP Business One Extensibility

entry.title: SAPA HANA Import schema error USERLOCen,column ambiguously defined:
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an SAP HANA schema from SAP B1 version 10 FP2208, I exported the schema then try to import on new Server with SAP B1 version 10 FP2502 HF1, but I encountered this error, tried to search for a solution but I found nothing, I appreciate your help, thanks

Could not execute 'IMPORT "SBOLIVE_TEST"."*" AS BINARY FROM '/backup/SBOLIVE_TEST' WITH IGNORE EXISTING THREADS 10' in 26.918 seconds .
SAP DBTech JDBC: [2048]: column store error: import failed: [30111] Import failed (could not execute create statement);object=HAN::SBOLIVE_TEST:USERLOCen,column ambiguously defined: Code: line 2 col 3 (at pos 9) at ptime/query/checker/check_id.cc:1379

entry.title: Opening UDO Form via Code
entry.content:
Opening UDO Form via Code

When attempting to open a User Defined Object (UDO) form using the following code:

  • Form? form = _app.OpenForm(BoFormObjectEnum.fo_UserDefinedObject, uid, null);
    uid is a FormType from an .srf file here, which was added to UDO dureing initialization.

The form does not open as expected.

In contrast, loading the form using XML with LoadBatchActions works:

  • _app.LoadBatchActions(xml);

However, this method prevents opening multiple instances of the same UDO.

Current Setup:

  • The UDO is registered with .srf file during the initialization of an object

  • .srf is properly associated through the UDO registration process

  • Despite this, OpenForm fails to open the UDO form.

What is the correct and complete sequence for programmatically adding and opening a UDO form in SAP B1?
And what is the correct approach in registering UDO in the system (with .srf file and etc).

entry.title: sap b1 servicelayer reachable from the internet - security
entry.content:
Hello,

do you know about sap b1 servicelayer security?
In case the service layer would be reachable from the internet?

We are using an external spend management cloudtool. (hosted by google and aws)
It exports the spend values to this servicelayer adress:

https://public-static-ip-of-the-local-sap-b1server:xxxxx/b1s/v2/Login/

Do you know about possibilities to improve security?
Maybe allowing source traffic only from AWS or Google Cloud is insecure.

entry.title: CDPOS, CDHDR, SM19, SM20 Logs Confirmation
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Share the following  logs for both application and database levels:

1.

Whether each of the above software have feature (Application & Database Level):
- When changes were made
- Who made those changes
- What data was changed
- Whether all changes are logged and not just the last changes
- Whether the audit trail is stored on server located in India
- Whether audit trail covers all type of transactions

(Change include creating new data, deleting, updating data)

We want =  Share the CDPOS , CDHDR ,SM19 and SM20 logs of 15 samples of the April month(1st to 15th) and next 15 samples of the current month(15th to 31st) for application and database level
Share the CDPOS , CDHDR ,SM19 and SM20 logs of 15 samples of the April month(1st to 15th) and next 15 samples of the current month(15th to 31st) for application and database level.

2. 

User IDs used for changes are assigned to each individual and that User IDs are not shared.

We want = Share the CDPOS , CDHDR ,SM19 and SM20  logs of 15 samples of the April month(1st to 15th) and next 15 samples of the current month(15th to 31st) for application and database level
Share the CDPOS , CDHDR ,SM19 and SM20  logs of 15 samples of the April month(1st to 15th) and next 15 samples of the current month(15th to 31st) for application and database level.

 

Regards,

Amir Sayyed.

entry.title: SAP Business One Delivery Note and Serialnumber History
entry.content:
Hello together,

i am working on an Integration for a Ticket System with SAP Business One. I already have some integrations working like syncing orders or invoices, which is all done via the B1 Service Layer Rest API.

I am stuck on a serialnumber search for delivery notes or invoices. It seems that there are not any options via the API so i tried fetching the data directly from the database.

What i am looking is something like the serial number transaction view. When you are in an delivery note you can go to serial transactions and see what and where that serialnumber was connected to.

I cannot replicate that via API or SQL.

This is the best i have done:

 

SELECT 
    OSRI.ItemCode,
	OSRI.ItemName,
    OSRI.IntrSerial,
    OSRI.SuppSerial,
    OSRI.CreateDate,
	OSRI.Direction,
    OSRI.BaseType,
    OSRI.BaseEntry,
    OSRI.BaseNum
FROM 
    OSRI
WHERE 
    OSRI.SuppSerial = 'MYSERIAL'
ORDER BY 
    OSRI.CreateDate

The least i would need is to find delivery notes on where a specifc serialnumber is linked to.

entry.title: Error 'cannot cancel document with a down payment that was drawn to invoice
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are attempting to cancel a previously issued check that was not deposited by the vendor due to it being misplaced. Our intention is to cancel the original check and reissue a new one. However, when we try to cancel the check, we encounter the following error message:

"Cannot cancel a document with down payment that was drawn to an invoice."

Could you please advise on the appropriate steps to resolve this issue and proceed with reissuing the check?

entry.title: Issue with FTPO Adapter in Integration Framework 2.0
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am currently working with Integration Framework 2.0 and encountering an issue when using the FTPO Adapter Type.

I am attempting to send an XML file from a local folder, using the FILI atom, to an SFTP server via the FTPO Adapter.

Please find below a description of the scenario:

  • Scenario Overview:

     

  • Structure of the XML file created in the local folder:

     

  • Inbound Atom (FILI): Connection is configured via SLD and tests successfully

     

  • FTPO Adapter Call in BizFlow

     

  • Outbound (Void)

     

After testing the scenario, the following results are shown in the Monitor window:

  • The status is "Completed"
    • However, the XML file is not transferred to the SFTP server.

 

  • When checking the BizIos1 details, the SFTP server parameters appear to be correctly mapped

     

  • The End BizFlow step appears to be empty

     

Additionally, I have verified the SFTP connection using FileZilla and WinSCP, and I am able to create and update files without any issues.

Could you please assist in identifying what might be going wrong?

Best regards.

entry.title: SAP Business One SLD Error
entry.content:
Hi Community ,

I need your guidance, more than anything else now. Tried every possible thing from my end and now I need those solutions which I can't think about or I don't know.

Long short , I installed SAP in my local system , version SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.270) SP 2411  (64-bit), restored a database, made entries and the very next day , I saw these when I went for choosing company.

When went to access the service manager , it showed up like this.

All of a sudden in the very next day the entire thing went away. I need to know some way to troubleshoot and way to get back everything. How to check what happened and how to fix this?


Thank you

entry.title: BUDGET AUTORIZATIONS IN SAP B1
entry.content:
Good morning esteemed experts,

Is there a place where I can consult to view the query for condition 5=Deviation from Budget for authorization models? I would like to see the generation of a query to establish ranges in the same way that the authorization model does natively from the table WTM4. An inconsistency has been detected, and I want to validate if it is possible to visualize it. In this case, the deviation calculates, for example, all purchase orders, and I want to make the connection. Is it possible to see that native query?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: SAP B1 HANA (10.00.280 FP2502) – Invalid Username or Password Issue
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have installed SAP Business One version for HANA (10.00.280) FP2502. However, when I attempt to log in to the SAP B1 client, I receive the following error:

"We are sorry... Invalid username or password."

To resolve this, I have already reviewed and attempted the solutions provided in the following SAP Notes:

  • SAP Note 3274346

  • SAP Note 3339938

  • SAP Note 3251679

Unfortunately, the issue persists. Has anyone encountered and successfully resolved this problem? Any guidance would be appreciated. (Screenshot is attached below)

Thank you in advance!

@ANKIT_CHAUHAN @richardduffy

entry.title: Error Encountered During GRPO Import with Batch Numbers in SAP Business one
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I encountered the following error while attempting to import a GRPO with batch numbers using the highlighted version:


Cannot add row without complete selection of batch/serial numbers65171

System Details
SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.130) FP 2008 (64-bit)

Regards 

Manikandan Kannan

entry.title: Customer Check out report required from CCO machine
entry.content:
Dear Team,

A customer checkout report is required with the following data

  1. Customer Name

  2. Customer Phone Number

  3. CCO Invoice Number (from the CCO machine)

Note: All customers are one-time customers so all are not created in SAP Business one

Kindly provide the report at your earliest convenience.

entry.title: Duplicated Batch Item Cost
entry.content:
Hi All

Please help confirm is it standard System behaviour and there is no way to change in Setup actual item cost is recalculated for Inventory Item in GRPO posted to a Duplicated Batch Number?  This Item is Managed by Batch and using Batch Inventory Item Valuation Costing Method.

Example, 

We need to input unique Batch Number in Goods Receipt PO to have independent item cost?

 

Kedalene Chong
